summary: POST /v1/outcomes ingests realized GMV/conversion idempotently, writes Campaign + predicted_vs_actual creator→product edges with calibration weight, and matching engine uses those edges to boost scores. Recommendations GET remains independent of outcome write failures.

interfaceChanges.description: Success envelope with campaign_id, is_duplicate, edge_count, calibration_weight

mappings.criterion: AC1: POST accepts realized GMV/conversion; success envelope
AC2: Duplicate idempotency key does not double-write
AC3: Edge weight reflects realized vs predicted delta
AC4: Outcome failure does not block GET recommendations
AC5: E2E ingest → matching score update

unit.note: Scoped run: test_outcome_ingest, test_api_outcomes, test_graph, test_api_recommendations, test_recommendations. Three legacy alert API tests fail on main (removed routers during pivot).
